jlDerivation: Achlioptas sign matrix, entries ±1/sqrt(d), signs from SHA-256 stream label jl/<D>/<d> (encoder det.ts DET_DOMAIN); verbatim copy of poc/harness/x4.ts jlProject — the projection X4 measured distortion on (Common rule 3: E-series claims inherit the R^d numbers: RDM Spearman 0.9608 synthetics / 0.9706 kernel-v0 at d=576)
layout: row-major float32 little-endian (numpy dtype <f4), one row per concept, row order = e5-concepts.json ids (seen authored alphabetical, seen synthetic by index, nonce by index)

kernel.note: rows unit-norm AFTER JL projection (README O1 operationalisation)

shuffled.label: e5/shuffle/0
shuffled.note: row i of the shuffled table = kernel[perm[i]]; derangement (no fixed points) enforced; spans ALL 524 rows (README O4)
